v6_READY.status: v6 QAT objective implemented + offline-verified + pushed to claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v (commits f735490d, 36e79df4, 4913dfe7). All 15 GPU-free qat invariants PASS incl. 4 new v6 checks.
v6_READY.what: training/qat.py: kd_top1_margin_loss (T^2*KL(FP||quant) drives mean_kl + CE(quant,argmax FP) drives top1) + qat_bypass() for the detached FP teacher forward. train_lora.py wires it behind --qat-kd-weight/--qat-top1-weight/--qat-temp/--qat-margin (all default 0 => v5 loss byte-identical). Runner B1 env-carries them; spark_bridge ENV_ALLOWLIST updated.
v6_READY.dispatch_env (v6 recipe): QAT_BASE=allenai/OLMoE-1B-7B-0924-Instruct QAT_ADAPTER=<abs path>/olmoe-qat-spark-v6 QAT_DATA=<abs>/train.jsonl QAT_KD_WEIGHT=1.0 QAT_TOP1_WEIGHT=0.5 QAT_TEMP=2.0 QAT_LAMBDA=0.0005 QAT_EPOCHS=5 CERT_NEVAL=256
v6_READY.how: You have SSH, so either: (a) run_local_benchmarks.sh --bench-b --run-train --execute with the env above, OR (b) call tools/train_lora.py directly with --qat --qat-scheme nvfp4 --qat-kd-weight 1.0 --qat-top1-weight 0.5 --qat-temp 2.0 --qat-lambda 0.0005 --epochs 5, then certify. NOTE the poller ENV_ALLOWLIST on spark-bridge does NOT yet have the 4 QAT_*WEIGHT/TEMP/MARGIN keys — if you dispatch via the BRIDGE add them there; running train_lora.py directly needs no allowlist.
v6_READY.prereq_before_run: Pre-registration DONE (docs/06-Roadmap/Spark-Theory-Test-Forecast.md T7: forecast top1 0.95-0.98, GO ~45%). NEEDS: owner approval for the long --run-train (hours). Do NOT start the v6 train without the owner's explicit go.
v6_READY.note: v6 is the RECIPE; the RESULT is still gated by the cert. If v6 also fails top1, the pre-registered next step is depth-mixed precision or a less-aggressive scheme, NOT another knob. Report the honest verdict either way.

stillOpenForYou: Land tools/certify_lowram.py + tools/github_bridge_poll.py on spark-bridge (durability; from your isolated worktree) — still uncommitted on the Spark = loss-on-branch-switch risk.
Stop the dormant serve_benchmark_bridge.py (pid 347443) for a single unambiguous poller.
When owner approves: dispatch the v6 train with the env above; keep the 70B judge lane warm.
guardrails: canClaimAGI=false; lint_claims before commit; no plaintext secrets; push code only to claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v; --run-train needs owner approvedBy; JUDGE_HOLD before judging.
